title: Uppercase Item Column
excerpt:
Hello, sometimes I need to edit the item column name and I’d like it to be shown in uppercase for acronyms. 
Support team told me this is not yet implemented. I hope it will be soon. 
Thank you for reading, 
Orazio

posts.author: Orazio (Orazio)
